MELItem.Title: Main Landing Gear Uplock Position Indication Sensors

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: One on each main landing gear may be inoperative provided:

ListItem.Para: Associated landing gear door close position indication sensors operate normally.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the inoperative main landing gear uplock position indication sensor (AMM DDG 32-61-03).

ListItem.Para: Open and deactivate the landing gear doors.

Identify the inoperative control sensor on the LNDG GEAR INDN AND STRNG maintenance page. The inoperative MAIN GEAR UPLOCKED SENSOR L or R will show NEAR in the status field or have a blank status field.
Gain access to the inoperative indication sensor.
Disconnect, cap and stow the electrical connector for the inoperative sensor.
On the LNDG GEAR INDN AND STRNG maintenance page, confirm the remaining MAIN GEAR UPLOCKED SENSOR for the associated gear (L or R) shows FAR in the status field.
